narrative:
Cols 49-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,090 registered voters, with 62.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.7 percentage points.
